name_en: M24042 Rose Twist PM LV Bloom bag features exquisite floral details and mood-lifting colors, a tribute to spring. Made of exquisite grained Epi leather, it features a polished two-tone LV turnlock and a removable chain handle adorned with enamel Monogram floral patterns. Removable leather smart straps enhance the versatility of this delicious feminine accessory. 19 x 15 x 9 cm (Length x Height x Width)
